oatmeal-and-apple-muffins-in-the-oven-or.name: Oatmeal And Apple Muffins In The Oven Or In The Air Fryer
oatmeal-and-apple-muffins-in-the-oven-or.original_name: Magdalenas de avena y manzana al horno o en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: 50 g of honey or cane sugar

instructions: We purport the air fryer at 160 been 3 been for 3 minutes. We use Silicone Mills for muffins that fall into the basket (they come out between 6 and 8 per batch, depending on their size) and we mix the liquid ingredients: compot, egg and oil. On the other hand, we put together the dried ones: flour, oatmeal, sugar, yeast, cinnamon and salt. We put together both of them without beating too much, just till we integrate. We filled the mold up to 3 / 4 of its height. We cook at the air fryer at 160 and 3 and for 13-15 minutes. We let them cool down a little while before we clear and move onto a grid.

We purify the oven at 200-3-with heat up and down. We prepared a plate with paper capsules for muffins (about 12). In a bowl, we mix with rods the compot, egg and oil until they are homogenous. In another bowl, we put together flour, oatmeal, sugar or honey, yeast, cinnamon and salt. Let's put the liquid ingredients onto the dry and remove them to integrate. We distribute the mixture into the capsules, filling 3 / 4 of its capacity. We baked about 20 to 25 minutes. They'll be ready as soon as I get a stick and I get clear. We let cold into a grid before we eat

octopus-salad-with-black-eyes-argiro.name: Octopus Salad With Black Eyes

ingredients.item: 1 dry onion small cut into rings
Little bit of chopped red pepper
1 dry onion small cut into rings
Little bit of chopped red pepper

instructions: We start by simmering the octopus in a small pot with oil, pepper, wine and vinegar, until it softens well.
Let it cool and cut it into bites.
On a platter, place the lettuce coarsely chopped
Add the beans, onion rings, radishes cut into slices, cucumbers and octopus bites.
Sprinkle with parsley and pour the salad with the zum in which the octopus boiled.

olive-oil-kale-stuffed-recipe-lezzet.name: Olive Oil Kale Stuffed Recipe
instructions: 1. Home
2. Add roasting, salçalar and rice in the olive oil.
3. Add spices and cook a little with 1 cup of water.
4. Inner wrap the harper cabbage.
5. Add less olive oil and hot water to the pot index, &uuml.
6. Close the cover and cook for 50 minutes on the jealous fire.

omelet-with-broccoli-argiro.name: Omelet With Broccoli
instructions: In a boiling pot, heat the broccoli for 3 to 4 minutes.
After it cools, cut it into small tassels.
Bake the broccoli tassels and fry them in a non-stick pan lightly with olive oil.
We keep the eggs at room temperature.
Beat the eggs with a fork and add salt and pepper.
Add the cheese.
Pour the broccoli with the eggs and fry over medium heat for about 4 minutes.
Turn it upside down so it can cook on the other side. It's light, full and very delicious. The fresher the eggs, the more delicious it will be!

one-pan-chicken-adobo.name: One-pan Chicken Adobo
instructions: In a container or a plastic food bag, combine soy sauce and garlic then marinade the chicken for 30 minutes.
Place a medium pan on medium heat and add oil, once the oil is hot put the marinated chicken and brown (about five minutes).
Pour in the remaining marinade and add water, then bring to a boil.
Add the dried bay leaves and whole peppercorn. Simmer for 30 minutes or until the chicken is tender.
Add the vinegar, stir and simmer for 10 more minutes.
Add the sugar, salt, and stir. Then remove from heat.
Enjoy!

one-pan-southwestern-chicken-quinoa.name: One-pan Southwestern Chicken Quinoa
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken breasts and season with salt and pepper, then cook until no longer pink.
Add the garlic and jalapeño and cook until fragrant, about 2 minutes.

Add the quinoa, vegetable broth, fire-roasted tomatoes, corn, black beans, cumin, and chili powder and season with salt and pepper. Stir to combine. Cover and simmer until the quinoa is cooked through, about 30 minutes.
Stir in the avocado, cilantro, and lime juice.
Divide between serving bowls and garnish with more cilantro.
Enjoy!

one-pot-lentil-bolognese.name: One-pot Lentil Bolognese
instructions: In a large pot, cook the pasta according to the package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in the same pot over medium heat. Add the onion and sauté until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Stir in the carrots, celery, mushrooms, salt, and pepper. Sauté until mushrooms have cooked down and are turning golden, about 5 minutes.
Add the wine and simmer until most of the liquid is absorbed, about 4 minutes.
Add the garlic and stir to combine, then add the diced tomatoes, tomato paste, broth, lentils, basil, oregano, rosemary, and baking soda. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then cover, reduce the heat to low, and simmer for 40 minutes, until the bolognese is thickened.
Serve the bolognese over the pasta, or, for a lighter option, use zucchini noodles or spaghetti squash.
Garnish with parsley.
Enjoy!

onion-jam.name: Onion Jam
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat. Stir sugar into oil with a wooden spoon, stirring constantly, until mixture is a light caramel color, about 10 minutes. Mixture will be very hot.

Stir onion, salt, and black pepper into sugar mixture. Onions will immediately start to caramelize. Stir frequently over medium heat until sugar has dissolved and onions are browned, about 15 minutes.
Pour red wine vinegar into onion mixture; simmer until mixture reaches a jam consistency, about 30 minutes. Let cool to serve.

onion-tea-home-remedy-for-cough.name: Onion Tea (home Remedy For Cough)
instructions: Bring water and onions to a boil over medium heat. Reduce the heat and simmer for about 1 hour.
Strain hot liquid through a sieve. Pour into cups and sweeten with honey.

orange-and-chocolate-bundt-teleculinaria.name: Orange And Chocolate Bundt
instructions: Preheat the oven at 180°C. Put a big hole in butter and sprinkle it with flour. Reserve.
Wipe the flour with the yeast and salt and reserve. In a bowl, beat the butter and cream cheese, until it's homogenous. Gradually add the sugar and the orange shaving and beat for another 5 minutes.

Add one egg at a time, beating well between each addition. Add the orange juice and tap a little more. Add the flour mixture and wrap. Divide the dough into two bowls, add the cocoa to one of them and wrap.

Lay the masses in shape, intercalating them to create the marble effect, or first place the white dough and then the cocoa dough. Take it in the oven, preheated at 160°C, for about 60 to 80 minutes. Remove from the oven and wait 10 minutes before deforming.

orange-bavaroise-teleculinaria.name: Orange Bavaroise
instructions: Shave the shell and squeeze the juice into oranges, lie down for a pot, add half the sugar and vanilla essence, take it to the heat and let it boil for 10 minutes.
Put the Jell-O down in cold water for 5 minutes and then drain. Remove the pot from the fire, add the gelatine, stir until it is well dissolved and let it cool.

Beat the creams in whipped cream by adding the rest of the sugar slowly and beating always, then add the orange preparation and mix gently. Lie down to a large shape or several smaller ones previously passed by cold water and take to cold until solidify. Before serving, dip the shape in hot water, deform and serve decorated to taste.

orange-cheesecakes-teleculinaria.name: Orange Cheesecakes

ingredients.item: Sumo e raspa de 1 laranja grande

instructions: Start the oven at 180 degrees. Garnish with butter 12 trays for cheese and sprinkle them with flour. Reserve.
In a pot, pour the water, sugar, juice, and scrape the orange. Bring it to the fire and let it boil until the sugar is completely dissolved. Reserve.
Numa tigela, misture o coco com a farinha. De seguida, junte os ovos e as gemas, bata muito bem e envolva no preparado anterior.
Distribua a massa pelas formas e leve ao forno, em banho-maria, durante 30 minutos. Retire do forno, deixe arrefecer e desenforme.

orange-souffle-argiro.name: Orange Soufflé
instructions: All materials must be at room temperature.
Shake the flour with baking powder.
Finely chop the chocolate and butter.
We melt them in ben marie.
Let them get a little lukewarm.
Add the eggs, yolks and sugar, salt and cinnamon to the mixer and beat until they hang and fluffy well.
They must double in volume and whiteen the mixture.
Add the melted lukewarm chocolate and flour to the mixture.
Gently mix with spatula so as not to lose the egg volume.
Butter the molds and sprinkle internally with flour.
Shake off the excess flour.
Balance the mixture in 10 bowls.

orange-zinger.name: Orange Zinger
instructions: Juice ginger, carrots, and oranges in a juicer, respectively. Serve immediately.

oregano-and-parmesan-bread-recipe-comede.name: Oregano And Parmesan Bread Recipe
oregano-and-parmesan-bread-recipe-comede.original_name: Receta de pan de orégano y parmesano

ingredients.item: 2 cda of dry oregano, with scales

instructions: Start your recipe and add warm water, sugar and fresh yeast.
Mezcla muy bien y deja reposar unos minutos para que se active.
In another bowl, place the wheat flour and make a volcano at the orific-type centre.
Now, add an egg, butter, sugar, oregano, parmesan cheese, salt and an already activated yeast mixture.

With the help of a pallet or wooden spoon, you'll be integrating from outside to inside till it's integrated. When you see that your mass's taking shape, get it to the top of your kitchen or work table.
Fold for about 10 minutes till you have a soft and fluffy consistency. It will be ready when it does not stick to your hands and has a smooth but firm consistency.
Haz de tu masa una bola y guarda en un recipiente engrasado, tapa con papel film y deja reposar por aproximadamente 2 horas.
After that time, your mass should have increased its size. and amasa for 3 minutes.
With a plastic knife or cutter, divide the mass into 4 equal parts. Let them stand for 15 minutes while you put them with a clear towel.
The oregano and parmesan cheese that have been put to decorate are mixed into a small bowl.

After his time, he takes a pint, presses to remove his air and forms a rectangle with his mass, encoils and puts him onto his oven plate, and his plate should be previously frosted and pitted or with scroll paper. Barnish every bread with his beamed egg.
The oregano and parmesan cheese spread above the loaves.
Luego haz unos cortes no tan profundos de manera vertical sobre el pan. Cubre nuevamente con una toalla limpia y deja fermentar durante 1 hora.
15 minutes before the lifting process ends, preheat the oven at 390 ° F.
Hornea durante 35 minutos, hasta que tomen un color dorado.
Terminado, deja reposar y disfruta.

original-bisquick-knock-off-gluten-free-.name: Original Bisquick® Knock-off Gluten-free Version
instructions: Grind the powdered milk until fine.

Combine rice flour, potato starch, tapioca flour, powdered milk, rice cereal, powdered egg whites, sugar, baking powder, cream of tatar, and ascorbic acid together in a bowl; mix with an electric mixer. Add butter and mix until well combined. Transfer to an airtight container; store in the refrigerator.

our-balsamic-vinaigrette.name: Our Balsamic Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine olive oil, balsamic vinegar, shallot, garlic, Dijon mustard, honey, salt, and black pepper together in a glass jar with a tight-fitting lid.
Replace the lid on the jar and shake vigorously until thoroughly combined.

5. Mix about 5 minutes until it is darkened.
6. Add 200 gr cheese and continue mixing.
7. Taste salt and pepper.
8. Add pasta and mix well.
9. Fill the pasta into an oven-resistant service container and cook until the remaining cheddar cheese sprinkles and rubs over 180 degrees heated oven.
10. Cheddar cheese oven pasta can serve with female meatballs.

oxtail-guisado.name: Oxtail Guisado

ingredients.prep: halved, ribs and seeds removed, cut into strips
tough stems removed, cut into 2"-long pieces

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Rinse 2½ lb. ½"–¾" thick oxtails under cool running water; drain and place in a large bowl. Add 1 large red onion, thinly sliced, 1 large green bell pepper, halved, ribs and seeds removed, cut into strips, 1 bunch cilantro, tough stems removed, cut into 2"-long pieces, 6 garlic cloves, finely grated, 2 tsp. sazón con culantro y achiote, 2 Tbsp. adobo seasoning, and 2 Tbsp. dried oregano and mix until meat is coated in seasonings.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large heavy pot over medium-high. Working in 3–4 batches to avoid overcrowding the pot, add oxtail (try to leave most of seasoning in bowl, but if some cilantro and vegetables adhere, that’s okay). Cook, turning halfway through, until browned on both sides, about 10 minutes. Transfer to a plate as you go.

Return all oxtails to pot. Pour 4 cups water into bowl with remaining seasonings and vegetables, then add to pot. Bring to a simmer (still over medium-high heat); cover and cook until liquid reduces by a fourth, about 30 minutes.

Stir 3 oz. tomato paste (about 6 Tbsp.) and a little oxtail cooking liquid in a small bowl until paste is dissolved. Reduce heat to medium and stir tomato paste mixture into broth in pot. Re-cover pot, leaving lid askew, and cook, skimming excess fat or scum from surface as needed and adding up to 1 cup water to keep oxtails covered if needed and/or reducing heat to medium-low to prevent meat from burning underneath, until meat separates from the bones and is tender, 30–60 minutes. (If meat still isn’t tender at this point, add a little more water and continue cooking, checking for doneness and adding a little more water every 15 minutes until ready.)
Do Ahead: Oxtails can be cooked 3 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container; cover and chill. Skim off any excess fat before reheating gently on stovetop or in microwave.

Gently toss 2 avocados, cut into about ¾" pieces, 1 large cucumber, peeled, cut into about ¾" pieces, juice of 1 lime, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and a pinch of freshly ground pepper in a large bowl to combine. Taste and season with more salt and pepper if needed.
Divide oxtails among plates and arrange some salad on the side of each.

oyakodon.name: Oyakodon

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs, cut into bite-size pieces
white and pale green parts separated from dark green parts, thinly sliced

instructions: Whisk 2 tsp. instant dashi powder into 1½ cups hot water in a large skillet to dissolve. Add 1 large onion, thinly sliced, ¼ cup plus 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, ¼ cup sake, and 1 Tbsp. sugar and set over medium-high heat. Bring to a simmer, swirling pan occasionally, and cook until sugar is dissolved, onion is slightly softened, and liquid is slightly reduced, 6–8 minutes.

Add 1¼ lb. boneless, skinless chicken thighs, cut into bite-size pieces, and white and pale green parts from 3 scallions, thinly sliced, to pan; cook, stirring occasionally, until chicken is no longer pink on the outside, 2–3 minutes (it won’t be cooked through).

Reduce heat to medium; evenly drizzle in half of 5 large eggs, beaten to blend. Cover and simmer until eggs are nearly set, about 2 minutes. Evenly drizzle in remaining beaten eggs, re-cover, and simmer until half of eggs are completely set and other half are still a little loose, about 2 minutes.
Divide steamed rice among bowls; spoon oyakodon, including big ladlefuls of broth, over. Garnish with dark green scallion parts.
